title: OIIAOIIA totem (Cot)
description: It's not just any cat, this totem makes the best music to the ears when activated
body:
**It's not just any cat, this totem makes the best music to the ears when activated**

This resource pack replaces the totem of undying, and also replaces the totem activation sound
